Name: Chicken & Brown Rice Bowl
Ingredients: Chicken Breast — 174g | Brown Rice Cooked — 195g | Broccoli Raw — 91g | Olive Oil — 14g
Steps: 1. Season chicken with salt and pepper. | 2. Heat olive oil in a pan over medium-high heat. | 3. Cook chicken 6 min each side until cooked through then slice. | 4. Steam broccoli 3 min. | 5. Serve over brown rice.

Name: Oat & Banana Breakfast
Ingredients: Rolled Oats — 90g | Banana — 118g | Whole Milk — 120g | Almonds — 14g
Steps: 1. Bring milk to a simmer in a small pot. | 2. Add oats and cook 5 min stirring occasionally. | 3. Top with sliced banana and crushed almonds. | 4. Serve warm.

Name: Spinach Omelette
Ingredients: Eggs — 100g | Spinach Raw — 60g | Cheddar Cheese — 28g | Olive Oil — 7g | Cottage Cheese — 50g
Steps: 1. Whisk eggs with a pinch of salt. | 2. Heat olive oil in a non-stick pan. | 3. Add spinach and wilt 1 min. | 4. Pour eggs over spinach. | 5. Add cottage cheese and cheddar then fold and cook until set.

Name: Avocado Toast
Steps: 1. Toast the bread until golden. | 2. Mash avocado with a pinch of salt and lemon juice. | 3. Spread avocado over toast and serve.

Name: Salmon & Rice Bowl
Ingredients: Salmon Fillet — 170g | White Rice Cooked — 186g | Broccoli Raw — 91g
Steps: 1. Season salmon with salt and pepper. | 2. Pan-fry salmon 4 min each side until cooked through. | 3. Steam broccoli 3 min. | 4. Serve salmon and broccoli over rice.

Name: Greek Yogurt Parfait
Steps: 1. Layer yogurt in a glass. | 2. Slice banana and place on top. | 3. Sprinkle crushed almonds and serve immediately.

Name: Lentil Soup
Ingredients: Lentils Cooked — 396g | Spinach Raw — 60g | Olive Oil — 14g
Steps: 1. Heat olive oil in a large pot. | 2. Add lentils and 600ml water then bring to a boil. | 3. Reduce heat and simmer 15 min. | 4. Stir in spinach and cook 2 more min. | 5. Season and serve.

Name: Sweet Potato & Lentil Curry
Ingredients: Sweet Potato — 260g | Lentils Cooked — 198g | Whole Milk — 100g | Olive Oil — 14g
Steps: 1. Heat olive oil and add diced sweet potato then cook 5 min. | 2. Add lentils and 200ml water then simmer 15 min until sweet potato is tender. | 3. Stir in milk and season with salt and cumin. | 4. Simmer 5 more min and serve.

Name: Broccoli Cheddar Bake
Ingredients: Broccoli Raw — 400g | Cheddar Cheese — 113g | Whole Milk — 240g | Olive Oil — 14g
Steps: 1. Preheat oven to 200C. | 2. Steam broccoli 4 min and place in a baking dish. | 3. Heat milk with olive oil then stir in grated cheddar until melted. | 4. Pour sauce over broccoli. | 5. Bake 20 min until golden and bubbling.

Name: Overnight Oats
Ingredients: Rolled Oats — 80g | Whole Milk — 180g | Greek Yogurt — 60g | Almond Butter — 16g | Banana — 60g
Steps: 1. Combine oats milk yogurt and almond butter in a jar. | 2. Stir well to combine. | 3. Seal and refrigerate overnight for at least 6 hours. | 4. Top with sliced banana before serving.
